name: Green Grass
benefit: Rich in natural nutrients and supports healthy growth.

name: Napier Grass
benefit: High-yield fodder that provides energy and fiber.

name: Pasture Grass
benefit: Promotes natural grazing behavior and digestive health.

name: Hay
benefit: Excellent source of roughage that aids digestion.

name: Rice Straw
benefit: Provides bulk fiber and helps maintain rumen function.

name: Wheat Straw
benefit: Supports digestive balance when mixed with other feeds.

name: Maize Silage
benefit: High-energy feed that helps improve body weight.

name: Corn Silage
benefit: Provides energy and supports healthy weight gain.

name: Lucerne (Alfalfa)
benefit: Rich in protein, vitamins, and minerals.

name: Tree Leaves
benefit: Natural source of nutrients and dietary variety.

name: Wheat Bran
benefit: Improves digestion and supplies essential nutrients.

name: Soybean Meal
benefit: High-protein feed that supports muscle development.

name: Molasses
benefit: Enhances feed taste and provides quick energy.

name: Mineral Mix
benefit: Supplies essential minerals for overall health and growth.

name: Fresh Water
benefit: Essential for hydration, metabolism, and overall wellbeing.
